title: Ubiquiti USW-Pro-Aggregation - UniFi Switch Aggregation Pro
description: USW-Aggregation-Pro is a fully manageable L3 switch in a 19" rackmount chassis with 4Ã SFP28 (supporting 1 G / 10 G / 25 Gbps) and 28Ã SFP+ (1 G / 10 Gbps support) ports: With a 1.3" touch screen , you can instantly see the most important information such as error conditions, warnings, port statistics, power consumption of connected devices, network load and more. USW-Aggregation-Pro is managed using the UniFi Controller or a mobile application, which allows you to easily create, scale and… (28) 1G / 10Gbps (SFP+) (4) 1G / 10G / 25Gbps (SFP28) - speed on all 4 ports is limited by the slowest of them, or mix. 1G and 10G modules 760 Gbps switching capacity Touch screen Backup power via SmartPower RPS connector Supported in UniFi Controller from version 6.1.25 USW-Aggregation-Pro does not have web management but is managed centrally by UniFi Controller with support for the UniFi mobile application and offers an extensive set of advanced switching protocols and L2 functions, including operating mode (switching, mirroring or aggregation) per port. UniFi Network Controller and mobile applications allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all graphical user interface functions from anywhere This generation of switches supports redundant power supply via a special connector to the UniFi SmartPower unit in the event of a failure of the primary power supply at the switch Devices Power cord 19" rack mounts
